info.title: PymtHouse Builder API
info.description: Machine-facing Builder API for integrator backends. OIDC issuer metadata (device flow, RFC 8693 token exchange at `/api/v1/oidc/token`) is published separately via OpenID Provider Configuration.

correlation_id.description: Request correlation id for support and audit.
Request correlation id for support and audit.

scope.description: Requested scopes for the user JWT. Defaults to sign:job.

lifetimeGrantedUsdMicros.description: Lifetime granted balance in USD micros.

signerUrl.description: Deprecated alias of signer_url for legacy SDK consumers.

correlation_id.description: Request correlation id for support and audit.

token.description: Deprecated nested mirror; prefer top-level OAuth fields.

apiKey.description: Long-lived per-app-user API key (`pmth_<hex>`). Rejects `pmth_cs_*` client secrets.

correlation_id.description: Request correlation id for support and audit.

m2mBasic.description: Confidential M2M client (`m2m_…` + `pmth_cs_…` secret). RFC 6749 client authentication.

bearerApiKey.description: Per-app-user API key (`pmth_<hex>`). Not an M2M client secret.

bearerUserJwt.description: Short-lived user access token minted by Builder API or OIDC.

adminSession.description: Dashboard admin session or admin-scoped platform token.

post.summary: Exchange API key for user access token
post.description: RFC 6750 bearer exchange: long-lived `pmth_*` per-app-user API key → short-lived user JWT (subject token for RFC 8693 signer exchange). Rejects `pmth_cs_*` M2M client secrets.

200.description: User access token (subject token for signer exchange).

400.description: Invalid request (including client secret presented as API key).

post.summary: Exchange API key for signer session (canonical)
post.description: Single-call path: `pmth_*` API key → signer JWT via internal user-token mint and RFC 8693-equivalent exchange. Preferred over dashboard BFF `/api/pymthouse/keys/exchange`.
Confidential client (`m2m_*` + secret) mints a user-scoped access token. Subject-token acquisition strategy for RFC 8693 signer exchange.

Integrator-hosted facade route (not served by pymthouse core). Documented for SDK compatibility. Response MUST match SignerSession. Prefer pymthouse `/api/v1/apps/{clientId}/auth/api-key/signer-session` for direct issuer access.

Served by oidc-provider. Use OpenID Configuration for full parameter matrix. Signer JWT exchange: `grant_type=urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:token-exchange` with `subject_token` from user JWT mint routes above.

get.description: Deprecated: prefer per-user keys at `/users/{externalUserId}/keys`. Sunset after SDK migration.
Deprecated overlap with `/keys` and M2M client rotation. Use OpenAPI Credentials tag.
Deprecated overlap with `/usage/balance` for M2M callers. Prefer `/usage/balance?externalUserId=…`.
Deprecated: Bearer validation for legacy BPP consumers. Prefer POST validate (C0) when enabled.

externalDocs.description: OIDC issuer discovery (device flow, RFC 8693 token endpoint)
